description: Product Description STATUS Timer Switch | 24 Hour Segment Timer Light Switch | White UK Plug | 24HT16 Safety Warning Application (resistive) load radiators, heaters, radio's and lamps etc. Application (inductive) load (electric motors) washing machines, dish washers, fan heaters etc. Do not exceed the maximum load required for this product. If in doubt consult a qualified electrician. Not recommended for use on immersion heaters.
